name: Parish
description_short: Parish FCU is a faith-based credit union serving members of the Catholic Diocese of Toledo since 1938, offering checking, savings, loans, and access to a global ATM network.
description_long:
Parish Federal Credit Union was established in 1938 as St. Agnes Federal Credit Union and has grown through multiple mergers over eight decades. The credit union merged with St. Mary's-St. Thomas Credit Union in 2001, added St. Ignatius Credit Union in 2006, and expanded its membership charter in 2012 to serve all members of the Toledo Diocese. The organization maintains its roots as a faith-based financial institution while modernizing its operations.

Parish FCU offers a range of consumer financial products including auto loans, home equity loans, share secured loans, and online banking services. Members can access their accounts through digital banking platforms and conduct transactions with customer service available by phone at (419) 729-9650. The credit union operates from its main office in Toledo, Ohio, with standard business hours Monday through Friday.

The credit union's primary distinction is its membership eligibility tied to the Catholic Diocese of Toledo, making it a faith-aligned financial institution with community roots. Members benefit from participation in a shared branching and ATM network with no fees, providing access to financial services globally. The organization emphasizes member financial health and prosperity as part of its core mission statement of promoting "FAITH-FAMILY-FUTURE."

As a traditional credit union with limited online information, Parish FCU lacks transparency about specific loan terms, APR ranges, fees, or detailed product features on its website. Prospective members must call for rates and account specifics rather than accessing this information online. The credit union's digital presence is minimal, with no mobile app information, rate disclosures, or online application completion visible. This traditional approach may appeal to local members but creates barriers for remote applicants seeking comparative information.
services: Online banking platform with login access
Checking and savings accounts (implied from banking operations)
Global ATM network access with no fees
Shared branch services with no fees
Member service support via phone and email
pros: Access to global ATM and shared branch network with no fees through credit union network
Established 85+ year history with multiple successful mergers demonstrating stability
Online banking platform available for members to access accounts remotely
Membership eligibility expanded in 2012 to serve entire Toledo Diocese, broadening accessibility
Faith-based mission aligned with Catholic values and community commitment
Personal loan options including auto loans, home equity loans, and share secured loans
Local main office in Toledo with dedicated phone support and in-person services
cons: Minimal online rate transparency—must call (419) 729-9650 for loan rates and terms
Limited digital capabilities with no visible mobile app, online loan application, or rate comparison tools
Restricted membership eligibility primarily to Catholic Diocese of Toledo members
Sparse website information about fees, loan terms, APRs, and specific product details
No information about credit monitoring, credit building products, or non-traditional lending services
best_for: Catholic Diocese of Toledo members seeking faith-aligned banking with community roots
Local Toledo-area residents preferring in-person service and established relationships
Credit union members wanting access to global ATM networks without usage fees
diagnosis: Parish FCU is best for Catholic Diocese of Toledo members seeking traditional credit union banking with faith-based values and local community ties. The primary caveat is that the organization operates with minimal digital transparency—prospective members must contact them by phone to obtain loan rates, terms, and specific product details rather than accessing this information online.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Parish — Credit Union in TOLEDO, OH | CreditDoc
meta_description: Parish — NCUA-insured credit union in TOLEDO, OH. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
